Matrix Palette Skinning

This section describes in detail the implementation of matrix palette skinning in use by XbView. It is divided into the following sections:

  • Vertex Buffer Data describes the vertex buffer format used for the matrix palette skinning data.
  • Vertex Shader Implementation describes the vertex shader implementation of the matrix palette skinner. It also describes the variations in shaders used to implement various advanced materials like bump mapping and reflection mapping.
  • Animation Data and Shader Constants describes how the animation data goes from the raw animation data in the resource file to the vertex shader constants needed by the vertex shader.
  • Optimizations describes optimizations in matrix palette skinning.
